title: Film clip — swing window reset

steps.title: Handlers set width
steps.body: CO has the disc. H1 and H2 stay wide so the mark cannot take both lanes.

selectedPlayerNotes.CO: Look swing first. Keep the mark honest.

steps.title: Swing window opens
steps.body: C1 clears the lane. The open-side swing lane is live for two beats.

selectedPlayerNotes.C1: Start the cut when the handler's shoulders open.

steps.title: Late reset cue
steps.body: The dump is a beat late. Run the same spacing but throw on the first open look.

selectedPlayerNotes.H1: Reset earlier so the swing stays open.

coachingSummary: Handlers held width well. Reset timing was late. Drill: dump/swing reset reps with earlier trigger.
